split_if: Split if the candidate owns more than one architectural decision.
Split if the candidate creates more than one runtime subsystem.
Split if the candidate mixes policy interpretation with runtime implementation.
Split if the candidate mixes backend, frontend, database, and CI without a contract boundary.
Split if schema/contracts and runtime code change without a narrow reason.
Split if validation ladders are unrelated.
Split if file ownership overlaps another ticket.
Split if the review would require unrelated context switching.
Split if a dependency is hidden behind vague wording.
Split if Codex would need to invent a decision during execution.
not_split_if: Do not split because the queue is long.
Do not split because the ticket touches many files within one owned surface.
Do not split because the validation ladder is long.
Do not split because the work may take more than one hour.
requires_human_approval_if: Exact files cannot be named.
Runtime behavior needs a new business decision.
Schema/API/permission/event/screen boundary is absent from committed source.
Validation command cannot prove runtime behavior.
candidates.blocked_reason: No approved Phase 6B commerce-specific runtime module/contract/manifest/prisma ownership was found for this seed.

candidates.title: Plan Phase 6B capability implementation for 6B retention and dunning rules
candidates.objective: Prepare an executable implementation ticket for 6B retention and dunning rules only after exact runtime ownership and runtime MCR can be proven from repo truth.
scope: Tenant billing view, balance display, budget cap controls, receipts, service spend views
non_scope: Runtime implementation is not authorized by v12.
Ticket generation/execution is not authorized by v12.
No invented business logic, schema, API, permission, event, screen, ADL interpretation, or service boundary.
files_forbidden_to_change: docs/process/v4_1/phase_6b/v1/** through docs/process/v4_1/phase_6b/v12/** unless the future ticket explicitly authorizes docs update evidence
runtime/frontend/backend/schema/generated/package/lockfile files outside the future approved exact-file plan
Prisma migrations unless explicitly authorized by the future ticket
required_outputs: Future executable ticket with exact-file plan, runtime MCR, validation commands, and non-overlapping ownership.
tests_required: Future ticket must include runtime tests or validators tied to the approved files. v12 cannot assign them without exact runtime ownership.
stop_conditions: Stop if exact-file plan reveals work requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Stop if the ticket cannot be completed without making an architectural decision not present in any committed source document.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
Stop if work drifts into runtime / Foundry / module installer / business modules / production auth / deployment / secrets / destructive migrations without explicit ticket authority.
Stop if a Prisma schema migration is required but not authorized in files_expected_to_change.
Stop if exact files cannot be named from current repo truth.
Stop if MCR would be documentation-only.
Stop if candidate overlaps another ticket file owner.
Stop if implementation requires a missing ADR, source decision, or screen contract.
acceptance_criteria: Candidate remains blocked until exact files, runtime behavior, MCR, validations, and dependencies are materialized from current HEAD.
No ticket pack may execute this candidate while ticket_generation_allowed=false.
candidates.rollback_notes: Rollback must revert only the future exact files named by the approved implementation ticket and preserve tenant/data integrity.
candidates.conditional_replan_required: Required if repo HEAD changes, exact files differ from this candidate, dependency tickets change, or validation commands are unavailable.
stale_ticket_risk_notes: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.
Current repo inspection found no approved Phase 6B commerce runtime scaffold/contract/manifest path for this seed; assigning files now would require Codex to invent architecture or stale paths.
Regenerate from current HEAD immediately before execution.
